name: Cheese Ball with Marinated Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
1 jar (7 oz) oil-packed dried tomatoes, drained
1/2 cup coarsely chopped pine nuts or toasted almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Position the knife blade in the food processor bowl.
2. Add the first four ingredients to the food processor.
3. Process until smooth and well combined.
4. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
5. Shape half a cup of the mixture into a ball.
6. Roll the ball in toasted pine nuts or almonds, pressing gently to help them adhere.
7. Repeat steps 5-6 with the remaining mixture and nuts.
8. Wrap each ball in plastic wrap.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Yield: 6 (1/2-cup) balls
Directions for gift card: Store Cheese Ball with Marinated Dried Tomatoes in the refrigerator up to 5 days. Serve with unsalted crackers.
